_meta.description: Derived, display-only readouts for Tier-5 power effects (see docs/mm-powers-ui-design.md section 2). These surface rank-dependent behaviour the player does not choose — a Growth character's size modifiers, an Insubstantial state, a Communication range band — as an info readout rather than an editable field. All values are game-functional numbers/labels derived from the rules, not copyrighted prose. Companion to effects.json and measurements.json.

kindKey.size_table: Emit the Size Table modifiers for a size shift of sign * rank (Growth +, Shrinking -); reuses measurements.json's sizeTable.
kindKey.state: Pick the byRank entry with the greatest rank key <= the effect's rank; show it as one label/value row.
kindKey.measure_offsets: One row per entry, showing the measurement (measurements.json column) at rank + offset; perRound appends '/round'.
kindKey.thresholds: One row per entry whose minRank <= the effect's rank (rank-gated flavour readouts).
kindKey.config_flag: A row whose value is trueText or falseText depending on whether config[key] is set (a player choice about content, not a rank).
kindKey.points_per_rank: A computed row of rank * perRank points (Variable's sub-budget pool).
